description_long: This object is a handheld electronic gaming console with a rectangular form factor and rounded edges. The device features a central display screen, flanked by a set of physical control buttons on both the left and right sides. The left side has a blue circular directional pad and a blue button, while the right side has pink circular action buttons and a pink joystick. The casing is predominantly black, with the buttons providing a contrasting pastel color scheme. The screen displays a soft, abstract background, suggesting it is powered on. The overall design is compact and ergonomic, suitable for portable use in urban environments.
description: A compact, black handheld gaming console with pastel blue and pink buttons and a central display screen.
description_view_0: The console is viewed from the bottom end, highlighting the pink joystick and action buttons on the right, with the screen and blue controls partially visible.
description_view_1: A side view showing the full width of the console, with both blue and pink control sets and the central display clearly visible.
description_view_2: Viewed from the top end, the blue directional pad and button are prominent, with the pink controls and screen also visible.
description_view_3: A side view similar to view 1 but from the opposite side, showing the arrangement of the blue and pink controls and the display.
